name: dwell-rock-plugins
description: Claude plugins for Rock RMS churches, shared by Dwell Community Church

plugins.name: rock-documentation
plugins.description: Answers Rock RMS questions from Rock's official documentation: routes to the right doc page and fetches the current content.

plugins.name: rock-developer
plugins.description: Rock RMS developer reference: routes Rock development questions (Lava, SQL, Obsidian/Helix, C# plugins, migrations, REST API) to the official developer docs and source, and fetches current content.
